case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. NOREEN RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, NOREEN $4,050.47 PRINCIPAL, $1,052.70 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,352.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, NOREEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-17-2012

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, NOREEN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
